Musk bashes OpenAI in deposition, saying 'nobody committed suicide because of Grok'

Sarah Perez

In a newly released deposition filed in Elon Musk's case against OpenAI, the tech executive attacked OpenAI's safety record.

The lawsuit against OpenAI centers on the company's shift from a nonprofit to a for-profit company, which Musk claims violated its founding agreements.
